name: antigravity-deck
description: Antigravity Deck — single-port workspace dashboard for Antigravity

scripts.dev: npx concurrently -n BE,FE -c cyan,magenta "node --watch server.js --port 3500 --no-auth" "npm run dev --prefix frontend"
scripts.build:frontend: cd frontend && npm install && npx next build
scripts.setup: npm install && npm run build:frontend && echo '✅ Setup complete! Run: npm start'
